case_title: MORGAN STANLEY & CO. INCORPORATED VS. A. RICHARD DELFS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY WITH ARBITRATION AWARD (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY & CO. INCORPORATED'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED.
